name: devsecops-agency
description: A fully autonomous AI software-development company in a plugin. You speak only to the CEO; the CEO holds board meetings with 9 Chiefs, each of whom runs a council of specialists. Research → Product → Architecture → Security → Execution → Quality → DevOps → Docs → Legal. Security-first (STRIDE + OWASP Top 10) by default. Ships to GitHub. v0.2.1 adds durable cross-project memory (three-tier Light/Deep/REM dreaming, ported from openclaw) and per-agent append-only JSONL session logs replayable with rg + jq. A live command-center artifact shows the org chart, every meeting, every handoff, and any blocker parked for you.
